text:
Tax Collector's Gauntlet (税務長の籠手, Zeimuchou no Kote) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Transformation: 20

|align=center colspan="3"|Grants you the ability to cast "Levy." However, it will destroy one random specified slot card from your binder every time. (You cannot cast it if your specified slots are empty.)

Summary

Tax Collector's Gauntlet 税務長の籠手 - This card allows the caster to summon a Tax Collector's Gauntlet. This allows its user to cast the ability Levy, regardless of any defensive or offensive spells in play. Each use of this gauntlet, however, destroys one random card from the user's restricted slot cards every time. The card will be rendered ineffective if no designated slot card is in the caster's binder.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.089 :: 税務長の籠手 
装備している間「徴収」を使えるようになる籠手。ただし１回唱えるごとに、装備プレイヤーの指定ポケット内のカードをランダムに1枚破壊される。（指定ポケット内にカードがないと使えない）
|-
![Eng]
|No.089 :: Tax Collector's Gauntlet 
The gauntlet allows the player to cast Levy. However, each time you cast it, a designated slot card will be destroyed at random. (cannot be used if the player has no designated slot cards).
|}
